commit.message:
Optimize Docker build with dependency layer caching (#36864)

1. Copy dependency manifests before the full source copy so that
dependency installation gets its own cached layer. When only source code
changes, the dependency layers are reused.
2. Remove the `GOPROXY=direct` override which was bypassing the Go
module proxy, causing build failures when git servers are unreachable.
The Go default (`https://proxy.golang.org,direct`) is now used instead.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude (Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

cannot locally validate them. Stripping all thinking blocks upfront
avoids the wasted round-trip that always failed then retried.

fix: revert proxy to exclude API routes, add Bearer auth fallback

The proxy's updateSession was consuming refresh tokens before route
handlers could use them (double-refresh race). Revert to the
intentional behavior from c52d240 where API routes are excluded —
route handlers authenticate independently via api-handler.ts.

Also adds:
- Bearer token fallback in api-handler.ts (reads Authorization header
  when cookie auth fails)
- fetchWithCsrf now sends Supabase session token as Bearer header for
  internal /api/ requests
- GET requests use fetchWithCsrf for consistent auth/CSRF handling
- 401 responses include debug info (cookie names, auth errors) to
  speed up diagnosis if auth issues recur

commit.message:
fix: add session repair and cancel-pending endpoints (#619) (#648)

Closes #619

## Problem
Users get locked out of chat sessions when tool calls fail mid-flight —
pydantic-ai refuses new messages when dangling tool calls exist in
history.

## Fix
- **POST /api/sessions/{id}/repair** — detects and repairs dangling tool
calls in session history
- **POST /api/sessions/{id}/cancel-pending** — cancels all pending work
items + repairs history
- **WS connect** — runs history repair on every new WebSocket connection
(not just server boot)
- Response models: `RepairResponse` and `CancelPendingResponse`

## Tests
- 125 tests pass, 6 new tests for the repair/cancel endpoints

Co-authored-by: Agent <agent@autopoiesis.ai>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restore CDP-controlled browser panels with typed createBrowserPanel API

Add createBrowserPanel(url) → BrowserHandle as the primary automation path
for external-URL panels, replacing the removed createBrowserChild. Also wire
window.open("https://...") in Electron to create browser panels (fire-and-forget
with child-created event), and add openExternal() for system browser.

Key changes:
- Runtime: BrowserHandle interface, createBrowserPanel, openExternal,
  onChildCreated, getBrowserHandle exports
- PanelLifecycle: createBrowserPanel (no manifest/build/FS), closeChild,
  isBrowserPanel guards throughout (rebuild, invalidate, unload, init)
- PanelView: createViewForBrowser (no auth cookies, no link interception,
  session partition), unregisterBrowser in destroyView (fixes CDP leak)
- Bridge: createBrowserPanel/closeChild/openExternal in both Electron and
  headless modes with URL validation
- CdpBridge: openBrowserTab (waits for cdp:register), openExternalTab,
  pendingBrowserCreations map, isPanelKnown rejection for stale registrations
- Extension: open-tab (create + attach + register) and open-external actions,
  cdp:register-rejected handler, tab cleanup on all failure paths

- Add bottom nav tabs for Profile and Admin (role-gated)

Add notebook-level sharing feature (001-share-notebook)

Implement full notebook sharing: users can share their entire recipe
collection with another user by email. Recipients approve before seeing
shared recipes. Includes notification badge, hide/unhide/remove management,
owner name attribution on recipe cards, and owner share management with
revoke. All backed by RLS policies on a new notebook_shares table.

commit.message:
Add YANG-derived CONFIG_DB schema validation

Validate all CONFIG_DB writes against SONiC YANG-derived constraints before
they reach Redis, preventing invalid data and partial applies. ChangeSet.Validate()
and CompositeConfig validation both gate writes with fail-closed semantics.

- schema.go: field type/range/enum/pattern constraints for all 30+ tables newtron writes
- schema_test.go: table-driven tests for Check() and ValidateChanges()
- changeset.go: Validate() called from Apply() before any Redis writes
- composite.go: ValidateChanges() called from DeliverComposite before Redis writes
- vrf_ops.go: AllowEmpty for VRF vni field (SONiC convention for clearing fields)
- CLAUDE.md + DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md: schema validation and write ordering principles
- Remove stale 2node-standalone suite (wrong device names, missing 4node topology)

Tested: go test ./... pass, 1node-basic 4/4, 2node-primitive 20/20,
2node-service 6/6, 3node-dataplane 8/8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use haiku for branch naming, fix prompt delivery, and misc improvements (#231)

* fix: use haiku model for branch name generation to reduce latency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reimplement TextInput to fix multi-chunk paste losing text

Replace ink-text-input with a custom implementation using useReducer,
based on ink-ui's text-input pattern. useReducer processes dispatches
sequentially so each insert builds on the previous state, fixing the
stale-value problem where only the last paste chunk survived.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: default detectionStrategy to claude so prompts are passed as final arg

Without an explicit detectionStrategy, getPromptInjectionMethod fell
through to stdin, causing claude sessions to receive the prompt as
pasted text instead of executing it. Default to 'claude' strategy
when detectionStrategy is unset.

commit.message:
Remove YouTube shared API key fallback from metadata fetching (#748)

* Remove Crawl-delay from robots.txt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove YouTube shared API key fallback from metadata fetching

The shared YOUTUBE_API_KEY should only be used for comment posting.
FetchMetadataJob was still falling back to it when users lacked OAuth,
burning the app's shared quota. Now skips straight to yt-dlp when no
OAuth token is available.

Also removes deprecated for_user_or_api_key, for_any_oauth_or_api_key,
and the Client.new shared-key constructor (no callers remain).

Closes #747
